faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Springfield Gardens?
faqs.answer: Springfield Gardens' abundance of trees, gardens, and older residential structures provides ideal conditions for stink bugs. These pests are attracted to the warmth of homes during cooler months and often enter through gaps in windows, doors, and siding common in the area's housing stock. Our treatments seal entry points and eliminate existing populations.
